revision.text: {{Japanese year|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}} [[{{MONTHNAME|{{今日の旧暦暫定/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} (Lunisolar)|{{MONTHNAME|{{今日の旧暦暫定/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}/{{JAPANESEMONTHNAME|{{今日の旧暦暫定/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}]] [[{{MONTHNAME|{{今日の旧暦暫定/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} {{今日の旧暦暫定/日}} (Lunisolar)|{{今日の旧暦暫定/日}}]]<noinclude> [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Templates for the Japanese Calendar Logic Fix Attempt]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "今日の旧暦暫定" to "Today's provisional lunar calendar"
revision.text: {{Japanese year|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}} [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} (Lunisolar)|{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}/{{JAPANESEMONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}]] [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} {{Today's provisional lunar calendar/日}} (Lunisolar)|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/日}}]]<noinclude> [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Templates for the Japanese Calendar Logic Fix Attempt]] </noinclude>

{{Japanese year|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}} [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} (Lunisolar)|{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}/{{JAPANESEMONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}]] [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} {{Today's provisional lunar calendar/日}} (Lunisolar)|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/日}}]]<noinclude> [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Templates for the Japanese Calendar Logic Fix Attempt]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Template:Lunisolar Today Long]][[Category:qq]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Today's provisional lunar calendar/日" to "Today's provisional lunar calendar/Day"
revision.text: {{Japanese year|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}} [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} (Lunisolar)|{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}/{{JAPANESEMONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}]] [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/月}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} {{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Day}} (Lunisolar)|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Day}}]]<noinclude> [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Templates for the Japanese Calendar Logic Fix Attempt]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Template:Lunisolar Today Long]][[Category:qq]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Today's provisional lunar calendar/月" to "Today's provisional lunar calendar/Month"
revision.text: {{Japanese year|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}} [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} (Lunisolar)|{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}/{{JAPANESEMONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}]] [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} {{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Day}} (Lunisolar)|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Day}}]]<noinclude> [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Templates for the Japanese Calendar Logic Fix Attempt]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Template:Lunisolar Today Long]][[Category:qq]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: getting rid of category cruft for potential import to simple english wikipedia All categories go to [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]]
revision.text: {{Japanese year|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}} [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} (Lunisolar)|{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}/{{JAPANESEMONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}]] [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} {{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Day}} (Lunisolar)|{{Today's provisional lunar calendar/Day}}]]<noinclude> [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]][[en:Template:Lunisolar Today Long]][[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Today's provisional lunar calendar" to "Lunisolar Today"
revision.text: {{Japanese year|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}} [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Lunisolar Today/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} (Lunisolar)|{{MONTHNAME|{{Lunisolar Today/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}/{{JAPANESEMONTHNAME|{{Lunisolar Today/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}]] [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Lunisolar Today/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} {{Lunisolar Today/Day}} (Lunisolar)|{{Lunisolar Today/Day}}]]<noinclude> [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]][[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]][[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Japanese year|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}} [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Lunisolar Today/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} (Lunisolar)|{{MONTHNAME|{{Lunisolar Today/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}/{{JAPANESEMONTHNAME|{{Lunisolar Today/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}}]] [[{{MONTHNAME|{{Lunisolar Today/Month}}|comment=this gets the monthname for the lunisolar calendar and presents it as a Gregorian month name}} {{Lunisolar Today/Day}} (Lunisolar)|{{Lunisolar Today/Day}}]]<noinclude> [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]][[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]][[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] [[Category:Japanese Time Calculation Templates]] [[Category:Date-computing templates]] </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
